title: Senior Teacher - Doubtnut - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Doubtnut - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Doubtnut invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Doubtnut:
Doubtnut is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut!
